description: Multi-vendor sanitized sample corpus for fallback translator evaluation

must_translate: switchport mode trunk -> port link-type trunk
switchport trunk allowed vlan -> port trunk allow-pass vlan
switchport trunk native vlan -> port trunk pvid vlan
switchport access vlan -> port default vlan
must_manual_review: spanning-tree bpduguard enable (not portable across vendors)
samples.notes: Basic L2/L3 switch config with STP. bpduguard is intentionally untranslatable in fallback.

must_translate: port link-type trunk -> switchport mode trunk
port trunk allow-pass vlan -> switchport trunk allowed vlan
port trunk pvid vlan -> switchport trunk native vlan
port default vlan -> switchport access vlan
must_manual_review: snmp-agent community ... cipher (secret material, auto-redacted)
samples.notes: Huawei switch with 10G interfaces and LAG. XGE prefix translation to TenGigabitEthernet.

must_translate: vlan batch -> vlan (comma-separated cisco/ruijie or vlan batch huawei)
port link-type trunk -> switchport mode trunk
port trunk permit vlan -> switchport trunk allowed vlan / port trunk allow-pass vlan
port default vlan -> switchport access vlan
stp edged-port enable -> spanning-tree portfast / stp edged-port enable
samples.notes: H3C switch with Bridge-Aggregation LAG. Clean config with auto-translate-only features.

must_translate: switchport mode trunk -> port link-type trunk
switchport trunk allowed vlan -> port trunk allow-pass vlan / port trunk permit vlan
switchport access vlan -> port default vlan
interface AggregatePort <N> -> interface Port-channel<N> / Eth-Trunk<N> / Bridge-Aggregation<N>
samples.notes: Ruijie switch with AggregatePort LAG. Ruijie uses Cisco-like syntax.

must_manual_review: ip route ... track <N> (track object not portable)
ip route ... name <NAME> (name semantics differ)
area <N> stub (stub area semantics not portable)
area <N> authentication message-digest (auth semantics not portable)
neighbor <IP> password <SECRET> (password must be redacted)
neighbor <IP> update-source <IF> (interface naming not portable)
set community <VALUE> (community values not portable, must be redacted)
ip prefix-list (prefix-list syntax varies significantly)
samples.notes: Complex router with OSPF auth/stub, BGP password, route-map community. K-B coverage: track, auth, password, update-source are MANUAL_REVIEW; community is redacted.

must_manual_review: ip route-static ... preference <N> (preference semantics not portable)
ip route-static ... tag <N> (tag semantics not portable)
default-route-advertise always (OSPF default route semantics not portable)
peer <IP> password cipher <SECRET> (password must be redacted)
peer <IP> connect-interface <IF> (interface naming not portable)
peer <IP> description <TEXT> (description semantics differ)
apply community <VALUE> (community values not portable, must be redacted)
ip ip-prefix (prefix-list syntax varies significantly)
samples.notes: Huawei router with route-policy community, BGP password, OSPF default-route. K-B: preference/tag/cipher/connect-interface are MANUAL_REVIEW.

must_translate: service 0 protocol tcp destination-port <PORT> -> service <NAME> tcp <PORT>
service 0 protocol udp destination-port <PORT> -> service <NAME> udp <PORT>
samples.notes: Clean Huawei USG security policy with TCP/UDP services and subnet address objects. All features auto-translate to Hillstone.

must_translate: address <NAME> <IP> mask <MASK> -> address name <NAME> ip <IP> mask <MASK> (topsec)
service <NAME> tcp <PORT> -> service-set + service 0 protocol tcp destination-port <PORT> (usg)
service <NAME> udp <PORT> -> service-set + service 0 protocol udp destination-port <PORT> (usg)
service <NAME> tcp <PORT> -> service <NAME> protocol tcp destination-port <PORT> (topsec)
policy <NAME> from ... action permit -> policy name + fields (topsec - one-line)
must_manual_review: nat source ... (NAT semantics differ across firewall vendors)
samples.notes: Hillstone config with zone/address/service/policy + NAT (dangerous feature guard). K-C: NAT guard verified.

must_translate: address name <NAME> ip <IP> mask <MASK> -> ip address-set + address 0 <IP> mask <LEN> (usg)
must_manual_review: address-group (address-group objects not portable)
nat source-zone / nat address-group (NAT semantics not portable)
ipsec proposal (IPSec parameters not portable)
samples.notes: Topsec config with dangerous features (NAT, IPSec) and address-group. K-C: dangerous feature guards for nat, ipsec verified.

must_translate: object address <NAME> <IP> <MASK> -> ip address-set + address 0 <IP> mask <LEN> (usg)
must_manual_review: object address-range (range objects not portable)
nat address-group (NAT semantics not portable)
samples.notes: DPtech config with address-range, NAT, and security policy. K-C: address-range and NAT guards verified.
